footer.description: Innovation Technology — your one-call partner for hardware, software, and IT operations across Egypt and the MENA region.

hero.description: Innovation Technology is your single point of contact for hardware, software, maintenance, and modern IT services — from Microsoft cloud and security to data center and voice — with clear scope, vendor-neutral advice, and delivery you can run after go-live.

services.title: Solutions Built for Scale
services.subtitle: From cloud infrastructure to AI-powered analytics — we cover every layer of your technology stack.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Business?
cta.description: Tell us about your environment — we'll help you choose the right stack, rollout plan, and support model.

partners.title: Organizations that trust us
partners.subtitle: A snapshot of the industries and businesses we support — from finance and healthcare to logistics and the public sector.

about_strip.title: Your one-call partner for hardware, software & IT operations
about_strip.p1: IN Tech helps SMEs and enterprises start, maintain, and upgrade IT services with a professional team — from modern infrastructure and cloud to security and day-to-day operations.
bullets: End-to-end delivery: advisory, implementation, and support
Vendor-neutral guidance focused on fit, performance, and cost
Regional experience across regulated and high-availability environments
about_strip.card_badge: Structured delivery. Clear ownership. Measurable outcomes.
about_strip.card_p: Whether you are modernizing legacy systems or scaling a new platform, we align technology decisions with business priorities — so investments translate into uptime, security, and speed.

why.title: A partner you can run with — not just buy from
why.subtitle: We combine deep technical execution with pragmatic planning, so projects ship on time and stay healthy in production.

items.title: Built for real operations
items.desc: We design solutions that stay maintainable after go-live — documentation, monitoring, and handover included.

items.title: Security-first mindset
items.desc: From identity to infrastructure, we treat resilience and compliance as part of the architecture — not an afterthought.

items.title: Support that shows up
items.desc: A responsive team for incidents, changes, and continuous improvement — with clear SLAs and ownership.

items.title: Best solution, best price
items.desc: We optimize for total value — fair pricing, clear options, and no junk add-ons bundled in at the last minute.

fulfillment.title: Box movers: hardware delivered the way you'd expect retail — clean, complete, no surprise add-ons
fulfillment.p1: When you order laptops, desktops, or appliances through us, we treat fulfillment like moving a sealed product: tracked logistics, careful handover, and a quote that isn't padded with optional bundles nobody asked for. You get the right device, configured to your policy — without competitors' "extras" stacked on top.
bullets: Sealed-box delivery where it matters — e.g. laptops ready for your imaging policy
Straight quotes: what you approve is what ships (no hidden line items)
Optional services are explicit — never smuggled in as mandatory add-ons
fulfillment.card1_sub: Asset-tagged and aligned to your standards.
fulfillment.card2_sub: From dock to desk — visibility you can plan around.
fulfillment.footer_note: No forced bundles · Best solution · Best price

process.title: A calm, transparent delivery rhythm
process.subtitle: No mystery phases — just a clear path from first workshop to steady-state operations.

steps.title: Discover
steps.desc: We align on goals, constraints, and success metrics — then map your current stack and risks.

steps.title: Design
steps.desc: Architecture, security model, and a phased rollout plan — with clear milestones and ownership.

steps.title: Deliver
steps.desc: Implementation with controlled changes, validation, and knowledge transfer to your teams.

steps.title: Evolve
steps.desc: Monitoring, optimization, and continuous improvements as your business scales.

pillars.title: Coverage across the stack
pillars.subtitle: The same pillars that anchor our company profile — expressed as outcomes you can measure: uptime, security posture, and operational agility.

items.title: Cloud & Microsoft 365
items.desc: Azure and Microsoft 365 adoption, migration, and governance — without throwing away existing investments.

items.title: Cyber security
items.desc: Network security, endpoints, encryption, and monitoring — built from leading vendor ecosystems.

items.title: Data center
items.desc: Servers, storage, networking, virtualization, and resilience for high-availability environments.

items.title: Voice (VoIP)
items.desc: Modern telephony that fits your workflows — hardware and software options for real business needs.

testimonials.title: Outcomes you can feel in day-to-day operations
testimonials.subtitle: A few themes we hear consistently after delivery: clarity, stability, and teams that regain confidence in their systems.

quotes.quote: They didn't just deploy tools — they helped us design a roadmap we could actually maintain. Our incident volume dropped within weeks.
quotes.name: Head of IT Operations

quotes.quote: Clear ownership, crisp communication, and strong follow-through. The security work was thorough without slowing delivery.
quotes.name: IT Director

quotes.quote: We finally have a partner that connects infrastructure decisions to business outcomes — not just tickets and tasks.
quotes.name: COO

about.hero_subtitle_fallback: Your one-call source for hardware, software, maintenance, and IT operations for SMEs and enterprises.

story.title_fallback: Built on Trust, Driven by Results

values.title: The Principles We Live By
values.subtitle: The commitments that shape how we engage clients, vendors, and each other — every day.

items.title: Innovation
items.description: We continuously adopt practical advances that improve outcomes — not hype for its own sake.

items.title: Commitment
items.description: We stay accountable from first scope discussion through steady-state operations and support.

items.title: Trust
items.description: Transparent recommendations and predictable delivery build relationships that last years.

items.title: Integrity
items.description: We align solutions with real requirements — fit, security, and value over easy shelf-ware.

items.title: Respect
items.description: We value your time, your policies, and your teams; collaboration is never one‑sided.

items.title: Quality
items.description: Engineering discipline, careful testing, and clean handover reduce surprises after go‑live.

items.title: Family
items.description: A people-first culture that stresses teamwork, empathy, and shared ownership of outcomes.

team.title: The People Behind the Work
team.subtitle: World-class engineers, designers, and strategists united by a passion for building things that matter.

hero.title: Our Services
hero.description: End-to-end technology services designed to accelerate your digital transformation and deliver measurable business outcomes.

grid.title: Everything You Need to Succeed
grid.subtitle: Comprehensive technology services that cover the entire digital lifecycle of your business.

profile_pillars.title: Service Pillars from IN Tech Profile
profile_pillars.subtitle: These are the foundation of our portfolio as outlined in the official company profile.

items.title: Cloud Solutions
items.desc: Design, deployment, and migration for Microsoft-based cloud environments including Azure and Microsoft 365, without wasting your existing on‑premises investments.

items.title: Cyber Security
items.desc: End‑to‑end protection for your network, endpoints, and data with leading vendors — including firewalls, UTM, encryption, web filtering, IDS/IPS, and more.

items.title: Data Center
items.desc: Complete datacenter solutions covering networking, servers, SAN & NAS storage, load balancing, power, and virtualization for high‑availability environments.

items.title: Voice over IP (VoIP)
items.desc: Modern IP telephony platforms that replace legacy systems with flexible, cost‑effective voice solutions tailored to your organization.

process.title: Our Proven Process
process.subtitle: A structured, transparent approach that delivers on time, on budget, and beyond expectations.

step1.title: Discovery
step1.desc: We deep-dive into your business goals, tech stack, and challenges to define a clear problem statement.

step2.title: Strategy
step2.desc: Our architects design a tailored solution roadmap with clear milestones, timelines, and success metrics.

step3.title: Build
step3.desc: Agile sprints, continuous integration, and regular demos keep you in the loop at every stage.

step4.title: Launch & Grow
step4.desc: We deploy, monitor, and support your solution — then help you scale as your business evolves.

why.title: The Difference is in the Details
why.subtitle: We don't just deliver software — we become your technology partner for the long haul.
why.point1: Dedicated project manager from day one

hero.title: Let's Talk
hero.description: Have a project in mind? A challenge to solve? Or just want to explore what's possible? We'd love to hear from you.

info.title: We're Here to Help
info.subtitle: Reach out through any channel — our team typically responds within a few hours.

form.title: Send Us a Message
form.subtitle: Fill out the form and we'll get back to you shortly.
form.message_placeholder: Tell us about your project or challenge...
form.sent_desc: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 business hours.
form.success_toast: Thanks — we'll get back to you within 24 business hours.
form.error_toast: Failed to send. Please try again.

service_detail.side_text: Ready to go deeper on scope, timeline, and pricing? Send us a short note — we'll respond with next steps.
default_highlights: Discovery workshop to align goals, constraints, and success metrics
Phased delivery with demos — you stay in control at every milestone
Documentation, handover, and optional ongoing support under clear SLAs
